decks.notes: The deck focuses on using artifacts to accelerate mana production and disrupt opponents' strategies. It aims to quickly get ahead on board presence and mana advantage through cards like Black Lotus, Moxen, and Ancient Tomb. By playing cards like Chalice of the Void, Null Rod, and Thorn of Amethyst, the deck can slow down opponents' game plan and control the board. With powerful threats like Golos, Tireless Pilgrim and Stonecoil Serpent, the deck looks to apply pressure and close out the game quickly, while also having access to utility lands like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter to disrupt opponents' mana base.

This deck focuses on using aggressive MUD strategies to quickly overwhelm opponents with powerful artifacts and disrupt their game plan. By utilizing cards like Mishra's Workshop and Ancient Tomb to generate mana, as well as powerful artifacts like The One Ring and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain, the deck aims to establish a dominating board presence and close out the game before the opponent can effectively respond. Additionally, cards like Chalice of the Void and Grafdigger's Cage help disrupt opponent strategies while cards like Grim Monolith and Lodestone Golem provide additional pressure on the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize graveyard recursion and self-mill mechanics to quickly fill the graveyard with key combo pieces like Prized Amalgam, Narcomoeba, and Creeping Chill. By using cards like Bazaar of Baghdad and Golgari Thug, the deck aims to take advantage of the Dredge mechanic to constantly bring back key creatures, disrupt opponents with cards like Grief, and overwhelm them with powerful graveyard-based combos and threats. The inclusion of disruptive elements like Force of Will and Chalice of the Void helps protect the combo and control the game tempo.

The deck focuses on leveraging powerful control elements combined with graveyard recursion and card advantage to outmaneuver opponents. It utilizes spells like Gifts Ungiven to set up advantageous piles, while also incorporating disruptive elements like Force of Will and Mindbreak Trap to disrupt opponent's game plan. The deck also features key mana acceleration cards like Moxen and Tolarian Academy to cast powerful spells early in the game. With the ability to generate card advantage and control the game's tempo, the deck aims to grind out opponents and secure victory through incremental advantages.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using Coveted Jewel, which acts as both a mana accelerator and win condition. The deck uses various fast mana artifacts like Black Lotus, Mana Vault, and Moxen to quickly ramp into the Jewel. The deck also includes control elements like Force of Will and sink into Stupor to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Key cards like Paradoxical Outcome and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain help to produce additional resources and card advantage, ultimately allowing the player to establish a dominant board state and win the game.

This deck focuses on disrupting opponents with card advantage, counterspells, and removal while leveraging Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion for additional value. The deck utilizes efficient cards like Ancestral Recall and Force of Will to control the game, alongside disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push. By utilizing powerful synergies and a strong mana base, Dimir Control aims to outlast opponents and grind out a win through resource management and efficient plays.

This deck focuses on playing powerful artifact creatures and utilizing mana acceleration to quickly drop threats on the board. It also utilizes disruptive artifacts like Null Rod and Sphere of Resistance to slow down opponents and gain an advantage. The deck is designed to put pressure on the opponent early in the game while also having answers to control decks through cards like Karn, the Great Creator. The use of artifact lands and artifact synergy cards like Mystic Forge and Inventors' Fair helps to maintain card advantage and consistency in the deck.

The main focus of this deck is to use artifacts and lands to control the board and disrupt the opponent, while also quickly reducing their life total with aggressive creatures. By utilizing cards like Ancient Tomb, Mishra's Workshop, and Wasteland to generate mana and disrupt the opponent's resources, as well as creatures like Stonecoil Serpent and Golos, Tireless Pilgrim to apply pressure, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory. Additionally, cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Urza's Saga provide additional utility and potential win conditions.

The key strategy of this deck is to quickly establish board presence with aggressive creatures like Glaring Fleshraker and Scrawling Crawler, while using powerful artifacts such as The One Ring and Mystic Forge to generate additional value and control the game. By utilizing cards like Grim Monolith and Tolarian Academy for ramp, along with disruptive elements like Grafdigger's Cage and Trinisphere to hinder the opponent's plays, this Aggro-MUD deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through a combination of speed, power, and resource denial.

This deck focuses on utilizing the graveyard as a resource through the Dredge mechanic, quickly filling up the graveyard with cards like Golgari Grave-Troll and Stinkweed Imp. By using cards like Bazaar of Baghdad and Serum Powder to manipulate your hand and graveyard, you can consistently bring back powerful creatures like Ichorid and Prized Amalgam. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Force of Will and Force of Negation to protect its combo pieces. By combining graveyard recursion with disruptive elements, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a powerful combo.

This deck focuses on a fast-paced aggressive strategy, utilizing a combination of disruptive creatures like Leovold, Emissary of Trest and Collector Ouphe along with efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay to control the board and pressure the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes powerful counter spells like Force of Will and Mindbreak Trap to protect its threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Dig Through Time help ensure the deck maintains momentum and stays ahead of the opponent in resources.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence and disrupt the opponent with powerful artifacts. Utilizing cards like Lodestone Golem, Glaring Fleshraker, and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. Additionally, the deck includes key artifacts like Time Vault and Mana Crypt to generate additional resources and maintain pressure on the opponent. By combining aggressive creatures with powerful artifacts and mana acceleration from Mishra's Workshop and Ancient Tomb, this deck can quickly close out games before the opponent can respond effectively.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan by limiting their resources and casting spells, while also applying pressure with aggressive creatures. It combines disruptive hatebears like Anointed Peacekeeper, Archon of Emeria, and Chancellor of the Annex with efficient mana acceleration from cards like Chrome Mox and Ancient Tomb. The goal is to slow down the opponent's strategy while deploying threats quickly to close out the game. The inclusion of powerful artifacts like Black Lotus and Moxen further enhances the deck's ability to execute its game plan efficiently.

The deck aims to generate fast mana through Mishra's Workshop, Mana Crypt, Mana Vault, and Moxen to cast powerful spells like Paradoxical Outcome, Tinker, and Tezzeret, utilizing Mystic Forge and the artifact synergy with Grim Monolith and Phyrexian Metamorph. The key strategy revolves around assembling the Coveted Jewel and using it to accumulate resources and generate card advantage, eventually enabling a game-winning combo involving Time Vault and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain or Urza's Saga. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Force of Will and Trinisphere to protect its combo.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's resources and disrupt their game plan while setting up your own win condition. This is achieved through powerful control elements such as counterspells like Force of Will and disruption spells like Demonic Tutor. The deck also includes combo pieces like Time Vault and Manifold Key, along with card advantage engines like Ancestral Recall and Lórien Revealed. With a mix of card draw, disruption, and powerful win conditions, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent in order to secure victory.

The deck is focused on a powerful combo that centers around the card Doomsday, utilizing cards like Dark Ritual and Gush to quickly assemble the necessary pieces. It also includes disruptive elements like Force of Will and Thoughtseize to protect the combo and disrupt opponents' strategies. The deck aims to set up and execute the Doomsday combo efficiently and effectively, while also maintaining a level of control and interaction with the opponent through counterspells and disruptive spells.
